query:
SELECT c.*, b.boardNumber, s.name as supplierName 
FROM material_colors c
JOIN material_boards b ON c.boardId = b.id
JOIN material_suppliers s ON b.supplierId = s.id
WHERE s.name = '测试供应商' AND b.boardNumber = 'B01';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT c.*, b.boardNumber, s.name as supplierName

JOIN material_boards b ON c.boardId = b.id
JOIN material_suppliers s ON b.supplierId = s.id
